aliases.description: Aliases to add to the Molecule.

authorIds.description: IDs of users to set as the Molecule's authors.

customFields.description: Custom fields to add to the Molecule. Every field should have its name as a key, mapping to an object with information about the value of the field.

fields.description: Fields to set on the Molecule. Must correspond with the schema's field definitions. Every field should have its name as a key, mapping to an object with information about the value of the field.

folderId.description: ID of the folder containing the Molecule.
